message:
fix(ci): Fix sed -i compatibility for Linux

macOS sed requires `sed -i ''` (empty string backup suffix) while
Linux sed interprets the empty string as a filename argument.

Solution: Use `sed -i.bak` which works on both platforms, then
delete the backup file afterward.

This fixes the benchmark CI failure on Linux where sed was failing
silently during trace hook injection, causing the WASM build to
never complete.

Changed locations:
- Step 5: Bundle patching for EdgeBox compatibility
- applyTracePatterns: Trace hook injection
